quick_skim.title: Two-Sample Homogeneity Test via Entropic Optimal Transport
quick_skim.abstract: This paper proposes a two-sample homogeneity test based on entropic optimal transport (EOT) maps from a common reference distribution -- the uniform law on the unit ball. The test statistic is the squared $L^2$-distance between the two empirical EOT maps. For fixed entropic regularization parameter, we prove that the population map discrepancy is identifiable, derive a functional central limit theorem for the empirical map difference under the null, and establish the Gaussian quadratic-form null limit. We also prove consistency against fixed alternatives and characterize local asymptotic power under contiguous alternatives. A weighted multiplier bootstrap is proposed to calibrate the non-pivotal null distribution, and its validity is established. Extensive simulations demonstrate that the proposed EOT-map test has reliable finite-sample size control and exhibits competitive power compared with other existing methods. The method is particularly powerful for location alternatives and, beyond a single scalar discrepancy, it provides additional diagnostic information on how the two distributions differ. Finally, a real data application concludes the paper.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses entropic optimal transport which is core to Schrodinger bridge problem
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用熵正则化最优传输，这是薛定谔桥问题的核心
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用熵正则化最优传输，这是薛定谔桥问题的核心
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用熵正则化最优传输，这是薛定谔桥问题的核心
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a two-sample homogeneity test using entropic optimal transport maps, providing a statistical tool relevant to Schrodinger bridge inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种基于熵正则化最优传输映射的两样本同质性检验。方法将参考分布映射到样本，通过比较映射差异进行检验。理论证明了可识别性和渐近性质，并给出自举校准方法。该检验与薛定谔桥问题中的最优传输紧密相关，为相关统计推断提供了基础工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种基于熵正则化最优传输映射的两样本同质性检验。方法将参考分布映射到样本，通过比较映射差异进行检验。理论证明了可识别性和渐近性质，并给出自举校准方法。该检验与薛定谔桥问题中的最优传输紧密相关，为相关统计推断提供了基础工具。

quick_skim.title: First-Order Trajectory Matching: Fast Ensemble Predictions of Chaotic, Turbulent, Stochastic Systems
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce First-Order Trajectory Matching (FTM), a surrogate-modeling method that learns the first-order local transport of probability mass from trajectories of stochastic systems. By matching the symmetric first-order motion of trajectories, FTM learns the probability current velocity, whose flow preserves time marginals to match ensemble averages, while also capturing current-like trajectory quantities such as fluxes, circulations, and barrier-crossing currents. FTM learns the current velocity directly from trajectories, avoiding drift, diffusion, and score estimation. Our stability analysis separates discretization error from sampling variance and shows that the one-step simulation-free FTM loss is stable when temporal resolution and sample size are properly balanced. Across stochastic dynamical systems and PDE examples, we empirically demonstrate that FTM provides trajectory-aware ensemble predictions at low, deterministic-rollout cost.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: learns probability mass transport via trajectory matching, akin to constructing a diffusion bridge between distributions
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过轨迹匹配学习概率质量传输，类似于构造分布之间的扩散桥
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过轨迹匹配学习概率质量传输，类似于构造分布之间的扩散桥
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过轨迹匹配学习概率质量传输，类似于构造分布之间的扩散桥
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: First-Order Trajectory Matching (FTM) learns the probability current velocity from trajectories, enabling fast ensemble predictions by matching the first-order transport of probability mass, avoiding drift and diffusion estimation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该方法提出一阶轨迹匹配（FTM），通过学习概率电流速度来模拟随机系统的轨迹集合。FTM直接匹配轨迹的一阶运动，避免了漂移和扩散估计，能够捕捉概率质量传输、通量和环流。该方法在混沌和湍流系统中展示了高效且稳定的预测能力，为扩散桥的构建提供了新的视角。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该方法提出一阶轨迹匹配（FTM），通过学习概率电流速度来模拟随机系统的轨迹集合。FTM直接匹配轨迹的一阶运动，避免了漂移和扩散估计，能够捕捉概率质量传输、通量和环流。该方法在混沌和湍流系统中展示了高效且稳定的预测能力，为扩散桥的构建提供了新的视角。
